subcodes.first_line: The Manifest Book, on this clear Day, calleth out amidst the religions and summoneth all to the Great Announcement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب مبین در این یوم مبین مابین ادیان ندا مینماید و کل را بنبا عظیم دعوت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
